description: Finalize Cloudflare launch hardening for the Convex-backed Vinext runtime by locking auth bootstrap routes, local Convex runtime behavior, and launch documentation into verified contracts.
deviation_notes: The track stopped short of a live Cloudflare deploy because unattended local execution has no production credentials; instead it hardened the checked-in Worker handoff, documented the Wrangler launch sequence, and validated the full lint/test/build gates.
